# daytona_sandbox_build_logs (Data Source)

Reads raw build logs for a Daytona sandbox. Daytona marks this endpoint deprecated; prefer the `daytona_sandbox_build_logs_url` data source for new configurations.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `sandbox_id_or_name` (String) Sandbox ID or name.

### Optional

- `follow` (Boolean) Whether Daytona should follow the log stream. Omit this for Terraform plans; a followed stream may block until the remote stream ends.
- `organization_id` (String) Daytona organization ID to send as `X-Daytona-Organization-ID`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Data source identifier.
- `logs` (String, Sensitive) Raw sandbox build logs.
